svg.text: Complete step-by-step guide for barangay secretaries and administrators
Manage residents, process document requests, verify accounts, and configure your barangay

text.tspan: • Open the Admin Dashboard URL in your browser
• Click "Sign In" to access the dashboard
• Your session persists until you log out
• Only authorized admins can access this panel
• See pending requests count at a glance
• Officials roster shown for quick reference
• Sidebar badges show action items per tab
• Click "Add Resident" to open the form
• Fill in: name, birthdate, sex, civil status
• Add address, zone, contact number, email
• Click any resident row to edit their details
• Delete removes resident + linked auth account
• All changes auto-save to the database
• Search by name, email, or contact number
• Filter by zone using the dropdown
• Export to CSV or Excel for reporting
• Paginated table with rows per page control
• Go to the "Requests" tab in the sidebar
• Pending queue shows all new requests
• Each card shows: document type, resident
• Click a request to expand full details
• Offline kiosk requests sync when online
• For new applicants: resident record is
• For kiosk requests: SMS sent to resident
• Use Chat to communicate with portal users
• After preparing the document, return to
• Chat message auto-sent to portal users
• When resident arrives to claim document
• View all releases in "Release Logs" section
• Filter release history by month and year
• See list of residents awaiting approval
• Verification history kept as audit trail
• Chat icon appears on each request card
• Send messages directly to portal residents
• Residents reply from their portal account
• Ask for missing info or clarify requests
• Enter title, content, and optional image
• Set start and end date for visibility
• Click any date to add a barangay event
• Admin events shown in blue on calendar
• Events visible on kiosk and portal
• Click existing event to edit or delete
• "Pricing" tab → set fees for each document
• Use pricing wizard for guided setup
• Configure service fees and SMS costs
• Enforced: pricing modal on login if not set
Treasurer — each group has slot limits
• Upload barangay seal for document headers
• Export feedback to CSV for reports
• Set zone count in Barangay Info tab
queue management when desk is active
of action items at a glance.

svg.text: Set prices for each document type in the Pricing tab before processing requests

For official use by authorized barangay personnel only
